summary: A social media app with a TikTok-style full-screen video feed. Each video card takes up one full screen height (100vh) in the main feed.
architectural_notes: Main feed uses full-screen (100vh) card layout, one video card per screen, scroll-based navigation between cards

existing_features.title: Redesign the main feed (HomePage) so each video post card occupies exactly one full screen height (100dvh or 100vh). The feed should be a vertically scrollable container with scroll-snap enabled (snap-type: y mandatory), so swiping/scrolling always lands on exactly one card at a time — no partial cards visible. The header should either overlay the feed or be excluded from the card height calculation so the card video+content fills the remaining viewport below it.

new_feature_requests.summary: Main feed: each video card takes up full screen height (100vh), TikTok-style one card per screen

projectName: TikTok-style full-screen video feed (one card per screen)
